kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\Landing\\Desktop\\docDev\\robotClaude\\front-back\\rf_tests\\suite_runs\\suite_S1781281364883_1\\browser\\traces\\temp\\af0e9962-c28b-4f32-8319-d64e2aee3456"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.saucedemo.com
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'problem_user' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'secret_sauce' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-test="inventory-container"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) lohi by attribute SelectAttribute.value from element css=[data-test="product-sort-container"].

kw.name: Get Elements
kw.doc: Returns a reference to Playwright [https://playwright.dev/docs/api/class-locator|Locator] for all matched elements by ``selector``.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Copy List
kw.doc: Returns a copy of the given list.

kw.name: Sort List
kw.doc: Sorts the given list in place.

kw.name: Lists Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if given lists are unequal.

test.doc: Sort products price low to high
